blended.narrative: Caberfae Peaks is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,261 ft. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.8" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 15°F. Expect powder.
